items.text: Utrogestan (progesterone) supply constrained: stat dispensing removed from 1 May, max 1 month dispensed at a time.
Nivolumab + ipilimumab now funded for resectable stage IIIB-IV melanoma (neoadjuvant + adjuvant) from 1 May 2026.
Venetoclax + ibrutinib or obinutuzumab now first-line funded for CLL from 1 May; ibrutinib widened as second-line.
Ticagrelor Sandoz supply issue ongoing: resupply expected early May 2026; use Mylan brand in the interim.
